visual_description: A medium shot shows two men in a dimly lit, cluttered office. In the foreground, a man in a light-colored collared shirt is out of focus. In the background, another man, also in a light-colored shirt, sits at a desk, wearing headphones and looking intently at a computer monitor. The office walls are covered with papers and maps. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The audio opens with a man speaking in a serious and urgent tone, his voice slightly strained as he says, "阿叶，注意" (Ā yè, zhùyì), which translates to "Ah Ye, pay attention." His delivery is quick and direct, conveying a sense of importance and a need for immediate focus. The camera cuts to a close-up of the man in the background. He is now the central focus. He wears large, black over-ear headphones and looks down with a serious, concentrated expression. He brings his hand up to adjust the headphones on his ear. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. Immediately following his words, a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score begins. The music is atmospheric and ominous, with a slow, deliberate tempo
